title: asparagus officinalis subsp. polyphyllus
intro: Asparagus officinalis subsp. polyphyllus, also known as Asparagus plurifolius, is a subspecies of the asparagus plant that is native to North America. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, containing compounds like saponins and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Asparagus officinalis subsp. polyphyllus include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which can help to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Asparagus officinalis subsp. polyphyllus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
